Search hidden objects and combine inventory items to unlock secret doors in this medieval escape puzzle. The gameplay revolves around keen observation and logical item use within dimly lit church interiors. Players must explore rooms thoroughly and solve layered riddles to advance through increasingly complex chambers while evading trap mechanisms.

Key Features

• Interactive item inventory system  
• Contextual puzzle-solving mechanics  
• Multi-room environment exploration  
• Sequential lock combination puzzles  
• Atmospheric medieval chapel setting

pages.title: Antique Village Escape Episode 1
pages.description:
Navigate intricate antique village locations by solving spatial puzzles and uncovering hidden objects to progress through each scenario. The game blends classic point-and-click navigation with inventory-based puzzle solving set in a rustic, mysterious village environment. Players face layered challenges that demand observational skills and logic to escape within limited clues.

Key Features

• Inventory-driven puzzle system  
• Point-and-click navigation controls  
• Multi-stage escape challenges  
• Hidden object discovery mechanics  
• Rustic village atmospheric design

pages.title: Antique Village Escape Episode 2

pages.title: Creepy Basement Escape Episode 1
pages.description:
Search dimly lit rooms for clues and hidden objects to solve puzzles and escape. This point-and-click adventure relies on inventory combination and observation to unlock secrets in a claustrophobic basement setting. Players piece together cryptic hints and manage limited interactions to progress through each room’s eerie mystery.
